mapper.select:
SELECT survey_instance_id, company_id, onboarding_id, survey_template_id, responder_user_id, scheduled_at, sent_at, closed_at, status, created_at, updated_at FROM survey_instances WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND survey_template_id = #{templateId} AND responder_user_id = #{responderUserId} AND status IN ('SENT', 'SCHEDULED')
AND onboarding_id = #{onboardingId}
AND onboarding_id IS NULL
LIMIT 1

SELECT survey_instance_id, company_id, survey_template_id, onboarding_id, responder_user_id, scheduled_at, sent_at, closed_at, status, created_at FROM survey_instances WHERE status = 'SCHEDULED' AND scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_at <= #{now} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM survey_instances WHERE status IN ('SENT', 'SCHEDULED', 'PENDING') AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND closed_at <= #{now} ORDER BY closed_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

select survey_instance_id as surveyInstanceId, company_id as companyId, onboarding_id as onboardingId, survey_template_id as surveyTemplateId, scheduled_at as scheduledAt, sent_at as sentAt, closed_at as closedAt, status, created_at as createdAt, responder_user_id as responderUserId, updated_at as updatedAt from survey_instances where company_id = #{companyId} and onboarding_id = #{onboardingId} and survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId} and responder_user_id = #{responderUserId} and subject_user_id = #{subjectUserId} and coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' and upper(status) in ('SCHEDULED', 'PENDING', 'SENT', 'COMPLETED', 'SUBMITTED') limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into survey_instances ( survey_instance_id, company_id, onboarding_id, survey_template_id, scheduled_at, sent_at, closed_at, status, created_at, responder_user_id, updated_at, purpose, subject_user_id ) values ( #{surveyInstanceId}, #{companyId}, #{onboardingId}, #{surveyTemplateId}, #{scheduledAt}, #{sentAt}, #{closedAt}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{responderUserId}, #{updatedAt}, #{purpose}, #{subjectUserId} )
